title: Better Insights, Smoother Experience
description: Dive deeper into your messaging patterns with the new expandable Friends Graph that shows more contacts in a dedicated window. We've also fixed issues that were causing duplicate messages on iOS and made the app icon look pixel-perfect on macOS Sonoma.
features: Friends Graph now opens in a resizable window showing your top 10 most-messaged contacts with improved performance
Enhanced chart tooltips that follow your cursor for easier reading
fixes: Fixed duplicate messages being sent from conversation cards on iOS
App icon now displays at the correct size in the Dock and System Settings on macOS Sonoma
